quality.rationale: 多步变分推导结合仿射参数条件+广义协变性+测地线泛函重参数化不变性

origin.question: Problem 7.25. Show that the variational principle$$\delta \int \left(\mathrm {g}_{\alpha \beta} \dot {\mathrm {x}}^{\alpha} \dot {\mathrm {x}}^{\beta}\right) \mathrm {d s} = 0$$givesthe same geodesics as the defining property for geodesics$$\delta \int \left(\mathrm {g}_{\alpha \beta} \dot {\mathrm {x}}^{\alpha} \dot {\mathrm {x}}^{\beta}\right)^{\frac {1}{2}} \mathrm {d s} = 0$$when s is proper length (not an arbitrary parameterization) and $\dot{\mathbf{x}}\equiv$ $\mathrm{dx}^a /\mathrm{ds}$ . If $\mathbf{y}\equiv (\mathbf{g}_{\alpha \beta}\dot{\mathbf{x}}^{\alpha}\dot{\mathbf{x}}^{\beta})^{\frac{1}{2}}$ , show that$$\delta \int F (y) d s = 0$$givesthe same geodesicsforanymonotonicfunction $\mathbf{F}(\mathbf{y})$
origin.answer: 在仿射参数 $s$ 下，对作用量被积函数进行任意单调变换 $F(y)$ 不改变欧拉-拉格朗日方程的核心结构，因此恒给出相同的测地线方程。
origin.solution: The general case gives an Euler-Lagrange equation$$0 = \frac {\mathrm {d}^{2} \mathbf {F}}{\mathrm {d y}^{2}} \left.\right. \frac {\mathrm {d y}}{\mathrm {d s}} \frac {\partial \mathbf {y}}{\partial \bar {\mathbf {x}}} + \frac {\mathrm {d F}}{\mathrm {d y}} \left[ \frac {\mathrm {d}}{\mathrm {d s}} \left(\frac {\partial \mathbf {y}}{\partial \bar {\mathbf {x}}} - \frac {\partial \mathbf {y}}{\partial \bar {\mathbf {x}}}\right)\right].$$Since $\mathrm{dy} / \mathrm{ds} = 0$ (for $s$ an affine parameter) and since $\mathrm{dF} / \mathrm{dy} \neq 0$ , this is the same as the Euler-Lagrange equation obtained from $\delta \int y \, \mathrm{d}s = 0$ .
